From core optical sensors to complete inertial navigation systems — Liocrebif delivers vertically integrated, high-precision solutions trusted by aerospace, defense, and industrial partners worldwide.

Precision Navigation for Critical Missions

From core optical sensors to complete inertial navigation systems — Liocrebif delivers vertically integrated, high-precision solutions trusted by aerospace, defense, and industrial partners worldwide.

Core Technology Platforms

Three integrated product lines built on proprietary technology, from components to complete systems.

Inertial Navigation Systems

High-precision FOG and MEMS-based INS/GNSS integrated navigation solutions for aerospace, marine, and autonomous vehicle applications.

FOG INS MEMS INS GNSS/INS
Explore Products →

Gyroscope Systems

Single to tri-axis fiber optic and MEMS gyroscopes from industrial to navigation-grade precision. Core sensing technology for stabilization and guidance.

FOG Gyro MEMS Gyro Tactical Grade
Explore Products →

Fiber Optic Systems

FOG components, fiber coil winding machines, and calibration equipment. Full in-house manufacturing capability from optical devices to production tools.

FOG Components Winding Machines Calibration
Explore Products →
Full-Stack Manufacturing

From Core Sensor to Complete System

Unlike assemblers who source components externally, Liocrebif controls the entire value chain. We manufacture our own fiber optic coils, gyroscope cores, and inertial measurement units — giving you better performance, faster customization, and competitive pricing.

  • ✓ In-house fiber coil winding & testing
  • ✓ Proprietary FOG & MEMS gyroscope design
  • ✓ Complete calibration & testing infrastructure
  • ✓ 13,300㎡ self-owned Optoelectronic Industrial Park
About Our Facility →
13,300㎡
Self-Owned Industrial Park
R&D Center
Production Lines
Calibration Labs

Featured Products

Industry-leading performance across our three core technology platforms.

INS
LKF-FS300

Fiber Optical Integrated Navigation System

Tactical-grade FOG-based GNSS/INS with self-alignment and RTK navigation for aircraft, ships, and UAVs.

FOG · Navigation Grade
Details →
Gyroscope
LKF-FS60

Single Axis Medium-High Precision FOG

Miniaturized closed-loop FOG with 135μm thin PM fiber technology. Compact, fast start-up, RS-422 output.

FOG · Medium-High Precision
Details →
Fiber Equipment
LKF-RH16

Precision FOG Coil Winding Machine

Multi-pole winding system with automatic glue coating. Real-time display of winding parameters.

Equipment · Multipole Winding
Details →
